name: Jamaican Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat and let it simmer until the sauce is reduced by one third, about 10 minutes.
4. Serve the sauce warm. It can be refrigerated for several days.
Variation: For chicken, replace the seafood stock with chicken stock. To make the sauce hotter, add a part of a minced Habanero or Scotch bonnet chile. Use caution as these are very spicy.
~ SOURCE: SMOKE AND SPICE
